title: AI Named the 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner (Shocking Prediction)
summary: AI Master, a comparative AI platform, runs Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash through 10 identical World Cup 2026 predictions to test their reasoning styles and decision-making. The video uses live falsifiable predictions graded against actual tournament outcomes to evaluate which models handle forecasting better.
writeup: The video runs Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5 Flash through the same 10 predictions about the 2026 FIFA World Cup to compare their reasoning styles and decision-making. It frames the exercise as a stress test: the forecasts are falsifiable and graded against actual tournament outcomes, which turns a casual prediction task into a concrete model evaluation. The takeaway is a head-to-head look at how each model handles forecasting under identical prompts, rather than a single confident answer about the winner.
